channel.title: Dr. Jeevun Sandher MP
channel.description: for Loughborough, Shepshed and the Villages

item.title: Barrow Crime and Antisocial Behaviour Forum
item.dc:creator: Eve Willett
item.description:
On Saturday, I held a public meeting for Barrow upon Soar residents to discuss their concerns about local crime and antisocial behaviour (ASB). I brought together the police and Charnwood Borough Council to join me on the panel. Thank you to everyone that attended or shared their views online. I really appreciate our community taking […]

The post Barrow Crime and Antisocial Behaviour Forum appeared first on Dr. Jeevun Sandher MP.

item.title: Working with Charnwood Borough Council
item.dc:creator: Eve Willett
item.description:
I held a really informative meeting with Rob Mitchell (CEO) and Jewel Miah (Leader) at Charnwood Borough Council. Many of the issues raised by local residents with me are to do with Charnwood so it is vital we work in partnership. We spoke about housing, protection from flooding and how we reduce crime amongst so […]

The post Working with Charnwood Borough Council appeared first on Dr. Jeevun Sandher MP.

item.title: Loughborough College
item.dc:creator: Eve Willett
item.description:
It was good to have a really productive meeting with Loughborough College this week, disusing how we get the skills our local young people need and what local business needs to succeed.

The post Loughborough College appeared first on Dr. Jeevun Sandher MP.

item.title: Visiting the Loughborough Area Foodbank
item.dc:creator: Jeevun Sandher
item.description:
This morning, I visited the Loughborough Area Foodbank and saw up-close the incredible work they do for the most vulnerable members of our community. The food bank is a testament to the staff’s dedication and compassion. I remain committed to supporting these vital organisations and the essential services they provide. Equally, I am focused on […]

The post Visiting the Loughborough Area Foodbank appeared first on Dr. Jeevun Sandher MP.

item.title: Meeting Our Local Police Force
item.dc:creator: Jeevun Sandher
item.description:
It was truly encouraging to meet with Chief Inspector Michelle and her dedicated team to discuss strategies for reducing crime and anti-social behaviour in our community. I hear consistently from constituents that addressing crime and anti-social behaviour is a top priority. Many of you have specifically highlighted concerns about shoplifting, bike thefts, and other issues […]

The post Meeting Our Local Police Force appeared first on Dr. Jeevun Sandher MP.

item.title: Mountsorrel Horse Fair Update
item.dc:creator: Jeevun Sandher
item.description:
Thank you to everyone who reached out to share your concerns about the return of the Horse Fair in Mountsorrel. As you know, I deeply value the harmony that makes our community such a special place to live. It’s this sense of togetherness that defines our area and strengthens our bonds. This weekend, the Horse […]

The post Mountsorrel Horse Fair Update appeared first on Dr. Jeevun Sandher MP.

item.title: My Statement on the August Riots
item.dc:creator: Jeevun Sandher
item.description:
See my Parliamentary statement regarding the August 2024 Riots:

The post My Statement on the August Riots appeared first on Dr. Jeevun Sandher MP.

item.title: Quorn FC Visit
item.dc:creator: Jeevun Sandher
item.description:
A big thank you to Quorn FC and their incredible homeless project. It was a pleasure to meet the team, and I’m grateful for the opportunity to lend a hand!

The post Quorn FC Visit appeared first on Dr. Jeevun Sandher MP.

item.title: Good Luck to Our Olympians
item.dc:creator: Jeevun Sandher
item.description:
This week, I’ve been cheering on Team GB as they head to Paris, with a special sense of pride in the outstanding contributions of Loughborough University in shaping such a winning team!

The post Good Luck to Our Olympians appeared first on Dr. Jeevun Sandher MP.

item.title: Parliamentary Swearing In
item.dc:creator: Jeevun Sandher
item.description: The post Parliamentary Swearing In appeared first on Dr. Jeevun Sandher MP.
